what_it_does: Acts as the root index and honest-state harvest report for the projection lane, listing 13 linked records and tagging each as verified, partial, attempted, blocked, banked, or dead-end according to a self-skeptical use-based verification discipline.
observations: Uses an honest-state discipline where 'verified' means re-seen by-use in the current session and everything else is tagged down.
Lists 13 referenced board items with one-line status annotations (verified, partial, attempted, built+banked, data-verified/render-blocked, mixed).
Explicitly states that no unblocked work of the author is left half-done and that remaining items are gated on others, not abandoned.
Warns that a tidy all-green record would be poisonous and that even this root record should be distrusted unless re-seen by-use.
References source address build-prep/universal-projection/OPERATOR-SURFACE-LOOP.md, surface/app/, and 391 projection commits.
Created and updated timestamps are identical, with a single history entry marking it as filed.
Type is 'guide', state is 'living', author_session is 'projection', and channel/thread are empty.
standouts: The self-distrust directive: distrust any 'verified' record, including this one, unless re-seen by-use.
The honest bottom line that no unblocked work is half-done and that the rest is gated on others.
The catalog of 13 linked records with explicit, informal status tags.
The rejection of inflated all-green status reporting as harmful.
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, address, type, state, author_session, links array, timestamps, and history.
board:// URI scheme for item addressing and references.
References use kind: references with a target field.
Markdown body uses all-caps section headers (STATUS, LANE/PERSPECTIVE, HONEST BOTTOM LINE, INDEX, etc.).
Status tags follow an ad-hoc honest-state vocabulary (verified, partial, attempted, built+banked, data-verified/render-blocked, mixed).
concerns: Created and updated timestamps are identical even though state is 'living'.
Status tags are informal and not machine-defined in this file.
'Verified' claims are not accompanied by concrete evidence or session artifacts in the file itself.
The file is highly self-referential and asserts its own potential untrustworthiness, which complicates relying on it.
Most substantive content is delegated to 13 external linked records not shown here.
notes: This is the projection lane's self-audited harvest root: a deliberately modest, tagged index of 13 work records that refuses to overclaim verification.
questions: What are the exact criteria that distinguish 'verified', 'partial', 'attempted', 'built+banked', and 'mixed' tags?
What does 're-seen by-use this session' specifically require?
Who or what are DNA, Tim, V, FACE-1, and the Right-Hand-Man in this context?
What is the content of the honest-state discipline record (item-c37e7864) and the harvest protocol (item-78c63045)?
What concrete evidence supports the 'verified' claims for the listed items?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to be the entry point and honest-state index for the projection lane harvest; the content matches that purpose.
apparent_themes: Verification by direct use rather than memory or assumption
Distinguishing blocked/gated work from abandoned work
Small verified sets preferred over tidy all-green dashboards
Ledger/harvest discipline for design and code work
intention_signals: To create a trustworthy, operator-facing status surface that surfaces only honestly verified progress and clearly tags blocked, banked, attempted, and dead-end work so hope is not mistaken for done.
novelty: The explicit institutionalization of distrust toward its own 'verified' records and the framing of an all-green status dashboard as poisonous rather than desirable.
contribution: A structured, self-annotated harvest index format that separates verified-by-use work from gated, banked, attempted, and dead-end work, making uncertainty and blockers visible instead of hidden.
summary_for_embedding: A living guide record that serves as the root index for the projection lane's harvest, listing thirteen linked records with honest-state verification tags and stating that only work re-seen by-use in the current session counts as verified.
intention_for_embedding: To provide an operator-facing, self-skeptical status surface that distinguishes verified progress from blocked, banked, attempted, and dead-end work without inflating completion.
